title: Mike Murphy on Office Hours
summary: Republican Strategist, Hollywood writer and producer, and Belfer Center Senior Fellow Mike Murphy (@murphymike) chats with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about the 2016 presidential election, kale messages, and who in Hollywood has the chops to be a viable political candidate for the Democrats.
body: Republican Strategist, Hollywood writer and producer, and Belfer Center Senior Fellow Mike Murphy (@murphymike) chats with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about the 2016 presidential election, kale messages, and who in Hollywood has the chops to be a viable political candidate for the Democrats. The latest from Belfer See more Gallery 1 of 4 Mike Murphy: Trump, Schwarzenegger, Clooney, and Affleck: The Hollywood-DC Nexus 2 of 4 Mike Murphy: Advice for Dems: Less Kale, More Hammers 3 of 4 Mike Murphy: Does the Truth Matter in Politics? 4 of 4 Mike Murphy: Did the 2016 Election Kill Data? Mike Murphy is one of the Republican Party’s most successful political media consultants, having handled strategy and advertising for more than 26 successful gubernatorial and Senatorial campaigns, including 12 wins in “blue” states that have consistently voted Democratic in the last two Presidential elections. His record in helping Republicans win Democratic states in unmatched by any other GOP consultant. Murphy has been called a “media master” by Fortune magazine, the GOP’s “hottest media consultant” by Newsweek, and the leader of a “new breed” of campaign consultants by Congressional Quarterly. Dec. 31, 2025 by Jeffrey Frankel Blog Post Abundance Nov. 2, 2025 by Jeffrey Frankel

_list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article features an interview with Republican strategist and Belfer Center Senior Fellow Mike Murphy, discussing the 2016 U.S. presidential election and the intersection of Hollywood and politics. Murphy, a highly successful political media consultant with a record of winning gubernatorial and senatorial campaigns in traditionally Democratic states, analyzes political messaging. The conversation touches on topics such as the effectiveness of Democratic communication strategies, the potential for Hollywood figures to become viable political candidates, and broader questions about the role of truth and data in modern political campaigns following the 2016 election cycle.
result.main_content_zh: 本文基于对共和党战略家、贝尔弗中心高级研究员迈克·墨菲的采访。墨菲是一位极其成功的政治媒体顾问，尤其在帮助共和党人在传统民主党州赢得州长和参议员竞选方面战绩卓著。访谈围绕2016年美国总统大选展开，探讨了政治传播策略，包括对民主党沟通方式的评论。对话还涉及好莱坞与华盛顿政治圈的联系，讨论了哪些好莱坞人物具备成为民主党可行政治候选人的潜力。此外，文章引申出关于真相在政治中的作用以及2016年大选是否削弱了数据驱动竞选模式等更深层次的议题。
